    Class MeshBuilder<TvG, TvM>

    Represents an utility class to help build meshes by adding primitives associated with a given material.

    Inheritance
    object
    BaseBuilder
    MeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder, TvG, TvM, VertexEmpty>

    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Geometry
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public class MeshBuilder<TvG, TvM> : MeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder, TvG, TvM, VertexEmpty>, IMeshBuilder<MaterialBuilder>, ICloneable where TvG : struct, IVertexGeometry where TvM : struct, IVertexMaterial
    Type Parameters
    Name Description
    TvG

    The vertex fragment type with Position, Normal and Tangent.
    Valid types are:
    TvM

    The vertex fragment type with Colors and Texture Coordinates.
    Valid types are:

    Constructors

    Name Description
    MeshBuilder(string)
